item.title: DQN
item.description: A Deep Q-Network (DQN) is a value-based Deep Reinforcement Learning algorithm that uses a neural network to approximate the Q-function, which estimates the expected cumulative reward of taking a specific action in a given state.

item.title: PPO
item.description: PPO (Proximal Policy Optimization) is an advanced Actor-Critic reinforcement learning algorithm developed by OpenAI.

item.title: Policy Gradient
item.description: Instead of learning: the value of actions (like Q-learning),Policy Gradient methods directly learn the policy itself.

item.title: Policy Network
item.description: A Policy Network is a neural network that directly learns a policy, i.e., a mapping from states to actions.

item.title: Rienforce
item.description: REINFORCE is the simplest Policy Gradient algorithm.

item.title: Squelette de Actor Critic
item.description: Actor-Critic is a reinforcement learning architecture that combines policy-based and value-based methods.

item.title: TD
item.description: The Critic computes the TD Error, which measures the difference between the predicted value and the observed value: δ=r+γV(s′)−V(s) where: r = reward received γ = discount factor V(s) = current state’s value V(s’) = next state’s value δ = TD Error .

item.title: index
item.description: EN-NAQQACH Mohssine AI - Groupe A 🧠 Deep Reinforcement Learning Algorithms DQN Policy Network Policy Gradient Rienforce Squelette de Actor Critic PPO TD Schema RL.canvas .
